name: Bluesky
description: A decentralized social network built on the AT Protocol. Launched publicly in 2023, it emphasizes open federation, user data portability, and moderation tooling.

name: Mastodon
description: A decentralized, open-source social network part of the Fediverse. Users join specific instances that federate with each other via ActivityPub.

name: Twitter / X
description: A centralized microblogging platform, rebranded to X in 2023. One of the most prominent social networks globally, focused on real-time news and public discourse.

name: Instagram
description: A visual-first social platform owned by Meta. Known for photo and video sharing, Stories, and Reels. Widely used for personal branding and creative content.

name: TikTok
description: A short-form video platform owned by ByteDance. Driven by a powerful recommendation algorithm and known for viral trends, music, and creative challenges.

name: YouTube
description: The largest video-sharing platform, owned by Google. Supports long-form videos, live streams, Shorts, and a robust creator monetization ecosystem.

name: Discord
description: A chat platform organized around servers and channels. Originally focused on gamers, it is now widely used by communities, creators, and organizations for voice, text, and video communication.

name: Twitch
description: A live-streaming platform primarily focused on gaming, though it hosts a variety of content categories. Owned by Amazon.

name: GitHub
description: A code hosting platform and social network for developers. Provides Git repositories, pull requests, issues, wikis, and Actions CI/CD. Owned by Microsoft.

name: GitLab
description: A fully open-source DevSecOps platform. Provides Git hosting, CI/CD pipelines, container registry, security scanning, and project management in one application.

name: Reddit
description: A link aggregation and community forum platform organized into subreddits. Known for voting-based content ranking and anonymous-friendly culture.

name: Tumblr
description: A blogging and social platform with strong fandom and artistic communities. Supports ActivityPub federation. Known for its distinct subculture and long-form posts.

name: Threads
description: Meta's text-based social platform, closely tied to Instagram. Launched in 2023 with ActivityPub support for federation with the Fediverse.

name: LinkedIn
description: A professional networking platform. Used for career development, job searching, B2B marketing, and professional content sharing. Owned by Microsoft.

name: Pixelfed
description: A decentralized, open-source image sharing platform in the Fediverse. A privacy-respecting, ethical alternative to Instagram.
